name: Social Media Content Distribution
description: When content is published, distribute across multiple social media platforms
prompt_examples: When I upload a YouTube video, create 3 tweets and a LinkedIn post
Post to Twitter and LinkedIn when I publish a blog post
Share new podcast episodes on social media
explanation: This pattern demonstrates parallel content generation from a single trigger. The YouTube upload triggers both tweet generation and LinkedIn post generation simultaneously.

name: Issue Management Workflow
description: When a GitHub issue is created, send notifications and create follow-up tasks
prompt_examples: Send me an email when I get a new GitHub issue
Create a task in my project management tool when a bug is reported
Notify the team when a high-priority issue is created
explanation: This pattern shows how to handle issue notifications with multiple parallel actions. The GitHub issue trigger sends both an email notification and creates a task in a project management system.

name: Content Publishing Pipeline
description: When a blog post is published, distribute content and notify stakeholders
prompt_examples: When I publish a blog post, send it to my newsletter subscribers
Post new articles to social media and notify my team
Create a summary and share it when I publish content
explanation: This pattern demonstrates a sequential workflow where content is first summarized, then distributed through multiple channels. The summary serves as input for both newsletter and social media posts.

name: Email Processing Workflow
description: When specific emails are received, trigger automated responses and actions
prompt_examples: When I receive an email from a client, add them to my CRM
Process support emails and create tickets automatically
Send automated responses to common inquiries
explanation: This pattern shows sequential processing of email content followed by parallel actions. The email is first processed to extract information, then used to create a ticket and send an automated response.
